nasb.text: Then I saw another beast coming up out of the earth; and he had two horns like a lamb and he spoke as a dragon.

esv.text: Then I saw another beast rising out of the earth. It had two horns like a lamb and it spoke like a dragon.

cnv.text: 我又看見另一隻獸從地裡上來。牠有兩個角，好像羊羔，說話好像龍。

ccb.text: 我又看见另一只怪兽从地里窜出来，它的两只角像羔羊的角，说话却像龙，

csbs.text: 接着，我看见另一只兽从地里上来。它有两只角仿佛羊羔，说话却像龙。
